query: SELECT bt.block_id FROM block_tags bt JOIN blocks b ON b.id = bt.block_id WHERE bt.tag_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL UNION SELECT bti.block_id FROM block_tag_inherited bti JOIN blocks b ON b.id = bti.block_id WHERE bti.tag_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL UNION SELECT btr.source_id AS block_id FROM block_tag_refs btr JOIN blocks b ON b.id = btr.source_id WHERE btr.tag_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
